rules.regex: '([^']+)' is not in the npm registry
rules.suggested_fix: Replace '{0}' with a valid package name in package.json
rules.manual_fix_steps: Check the package name spelling and run 'npm install {0}' once corrected.

rules.suggested_fix: Replace '{0}' with a valid package name
rules.manual_fix_steps: Check the package name spelling and run 'npm install {0}' once corrected.

rules.suggested_fix: Check for typos in package.json dependencies.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'npm install {0}' manually or check repository.

rules.suggested_fix: Check for typos in package.json dependencies.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'npm install' to refresh dependencies.

rules.suggested_fix: Resolve version conflicts or use --legacy-peer-deps
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'npm install --legacy-peer-deps' to override peer dependency checks.

rules.regex: failed to solve with frontend dockerfile
rules.suggested_fix: Check Dockerfile syntax and context.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'docker build --no-cache .' and check the Dockerfile syntax.

rules.suggested_fix: Check Dockerfile syntax and context.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'docker build --no-cache .' and check the Dockerfile commands.

rules.suggested_fix: Review the failing command in the Dockerfile.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Check Dockerfile command and rebuild without cache.

rules.suggested_fix: Verify the image name and registry credentials.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'kubectl describe pod {0}' to see the pulling error.

rules.suggested_fix: Verify the image name and registry credentials.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'kubectl describe pod <pod-name>' to verify image pull errors.

rules.suggested_fix: Check pod logs to identify why the application is crashing.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'kubectl logs {0}' to inspect the application crash logs.

rules.suggested_fix: Check pod logs to identify why the application is crashing.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'kubectl logs <pod-name>' to inspect the application crash logs.

rules.suggested_fix: Install the '{0}' module using pip.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'pip install {0}' in your environment.

rules.suggested_fix: Install the missing module via pip.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'pip install <module>' in your environment.

rules.suggested_fix: Check pip logs for details.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'pip install {0}' manually to see the error output.

rules.suggested_fix: Check pip logs for details.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Check pip logs and try running 'pip install' manually.

rules.suggested_fix: Review the pipeline step logs.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Rerun the pipeline and review failed step logs.

rules.regex: Build step marked build as failure
rules.suggested_fix: Examine previous build steps for errors.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Rerun the pipeline and review failed step logs.

rules.suggested_fix: Check file permissions and user privileges.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'sudo chmod' or 'sudo chown' to grant appropriate permissions.

rules.suggested_fix: Fix directory permissions or avoid running npm as root.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Run 'sudo chown -R $USER ~/.npm' or fix directory permissions.

rules.suggested_fix: Check network connectivity and firewall rules.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Check network connectivity and registry availability.

rules.suggested_fix: Verify URL and network connection.
rules.manual_fix_steps: Check network connectivity and registry availability.
